channel.title: 2026-03-21 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS

item.title: [ASAP] An Algorithm for Atom-Centered Lossy Compression of the Atomic Orbital Basis in Density Functional Theory Calculations
item.description:
📚 ACS
👤 Anthony O. Lara, Justin J. Talbot, Zhe Wang, and Martin Head-Gordon
Journal of Chemical Theory and Computation DOI: 10.1021/acs.jctc.5c01988
